data.title: b9b9-18e3: Task C — Update gate-signal-schema consumers table for INTENT_CONFLICT signal
data.description:
## Story
b9b9-18e3 — Enhance intent-search to validate bug behavioral claims against actual callers

## testing_mode
GREEN

## TDD Exemption
Exemption criterion 3: static assets only / non-executable instruction files. plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md is a markdown documentation file. No executable assertion is possible for content correctness. Structural boundary: test_gate_signal_schema_updated in tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh (added in Task A) validates the consumer row was added.

## File to Modify
plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md

## Required Changes

### 1. Add consumer row to Consumers table
In the Consumers table, add:
| b9b9-18e3 | 1a (INTENT_CONFLICT) | primary | Caller traversal validation; emits additional fields: behavioral_claim, conflicting_callers[], dependency_classification |

### 2. Add INTENT_CONFLICT extension fields note
In the Optional Extension Fields subsection (added by epic story f9d9-343d Task C), add a row for intent-search:
| behavioral_claim | string | intent-search (gate 1a INTENT_CONFLICT) | The ticket's stated behavioral expectation — what the ticket says should happen |
| conflicting_callers | array of objects | intent-search (gate 1a INTENT_CONFLICT) | Array of caller file paths and usage snippets showing dependency on current behavior |
| dependency_classification | string (enum) | intent-search (gate 1a INTENT_CONFLICT) | Overall dependency verdict: behavioral_dependency or incidental_usage |

Note: If the Optional Extension Fields subsection does not yet exist (f9d9-343d Task C not yet merged), create it following the same pattern as documented in f9d9-343d Task C description.

### 3. Update Change Log
Add entry:
- 2026-04-11: Added b9b9-18e3 consumer (INTENT_CONFLICT signal from gate 1a caller traversal); documented behavioral_claim, conflicting_callers, dependency_classification extension fields.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] gate-signal-schema.md Consumers table contains a row referencing b9b9-18e3
  Verify: grep -q 'b9b9-18e3' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md
- [ ] gate-signal-schema.md documents behavioral_claim, conflicting_callers, dependency_classification as extension fields for gate 1a
  Verify: grep -q 'behavioral_claim' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md && grep -q 'conflicting_callers' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md && grep -q 'dependency_classification' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md
- [ ] test_gate_signal_schema_updated in tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh now passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh 2>&1 | grep 'PASS.*test_gate_signal_schema_updated'
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
